title: pilosocereus lanuginosus
intro: Pilosocereus lanuginosus, also known as the woolly pincushion cactus, is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Pilosocereus lanuginosus include the treatment of wounds, burns, and skin infections, as well as the relief of digestive issues and fever. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve the use of its stems and flowers, which can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments for external use.
